description: Assemble reads into a set of contigs
label: Assemble viral genomes

group.desc: FASTQ or FASTA file of reads
group.label: Read file 1

group.desc: FASTQ or FASTA file of reads
group.label: Read file 2

group.desc: FASTQ, FASTA or H5 file of reads
group.label: Read file

parameters.desc: SRA run accession (e.g. SRR12345678) used with p3-sra when reads are not uploaded
parameters.label: SRA run ID

parameters.desc: Virus genome to use a correct module
parameters.label: Virus module

parameters.desc: GenBank accession(s) for reference-guided assembly when reference type is genbank (use ACC1;ACC2 for multiple)
parameters.label: GenBank reference (accession)

parameters.desc: Workspace path to reference FASTA when reference type is fasta (use path1;path2 for multiple files)
parameters.label: Reference FASTA file

parameters.desc: Path to which the output will be written. Defaults to the directory containing the input data.
parameters.label: Output Folder

parameters.desc: Basename for the generated output files. Defaults to the basename of the input data.
parameters.label: File Basename

parameters.desc: Email for NCBI Entrez (used when fetching GenBank accessions in reference-guided mode)
parameters.label: Entrez email
